item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:law","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":true,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"Link the authority-holders explicitly to the place and its residents, and make their bad action target the offender; the current honest lossy flag does not cure these missing criterial relations."}
